name: A Chair for the girls!
description:
original bio - Lynette got a new toy from yae miko, just when she started to have fun with it, 2 other girls showed up to ruin everything...
my converted text - Lynette received a new toy from Yae Miko. Before she could have fun with it, Furina and Hu Tao entered the tavern and learned about Lynette's new toy.
creator: Glowing real
